title: dryopteris chrysocoma
intro: Dryopteris chrysocoma, also known as golden buckler fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the Dryopteridaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which are attributed to its high content of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of D. chrysocoma include its ability to protect against oxidative stress, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antimicrobial properties, making it a potential remedy for various health issues. The herbal preparations of D. chrysocoma include tea, infusion, and extract, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
